title: Israel Launches New Attacks in Lebanon, Days Ahead of Rare Direct Talks
summary_full: Israel’s campaign targeting Hezbollah in Lebanon has been a source of tension in the U.S.-Iran cease-fire. Israeli and Lebanese officials plan to meet for rare talks in Washington this week.
summary_public: Israel’s campaign targeting Hezbollah in Lebanon has been a source of tension in the U.S.-Iran cease-fire. Israeli and Lebanese officials plan to meet for rare talks in Washington this week.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel Launches New Attacks in Lebanon
